Why I'm Watching It
Every new data center contract becomes recurring revenue for 5-7 years as AI chips get hotter. But consecutive earnings misses of 15-35% while trading at 89x free cash flow suggests they're losing the race against commoditization despite massive demand.
Moat
Switching costs only apply to replacements, not new construction
Risks
Consecutive quarters of 15-35% earnings misses during supposed demand boom
